svg.title: AI-TDD toolchain ecosystem
svg.desc: Shows the toolchain layers from requirement records and contract execution to gates, agent control plane, skills, and CLI entry points.
svg.text: Control Plane → Store → Six Mental Models → CLI → External Integration
Cross-layer orchestration | State management | Decision routing | Human-AI collaboration
Contract matrix persistence | Trace evidence storage | State snapshots
1. Main Agent Control Plane: Cross-layer orchestration, state management, decision routing, human-AI collaboration
2. Controlled RequirementRecord Store: Contract matrix persistence, trace evidence storage, state snapshots
3. Six Mental Models are internal concepts with 16 subsystems; users don't directly interact with them
4. Human-in-loop mandatory checkpoints: Requirement → Architecture → Delivery (3 Human-in-loop points)
5. 16 subsystems distribution: Requirement(2) + Architecture(1) + Implementation(1) + Execution(3) + Audit(6) + Delivery(3)
6. Audit Review (6 subsystems) exposes CLI: score, check-score, coach, sft-extract, scores
7. Delivery Confirmation (3 subsystems) exposes CLI: dashboard, dashboard-status
